orgName.title: Organization name
orgName.description: Shown to end users as 'Settings controlled by <orgName>'.

allowUserRules.title: Allow user-authored rules
allowUserRules.description: When false, end users cannot add/edit rules and stored user rules are ignored.

protectedDomains.title: Protected login domains
protectedDomains.description: Brand domains to protect from lookalike/typosquat navigation (T1566.002).
